content:
GitHub
     │
     ▼
IVX Deployment Engine
     │
     ├── Verify latest commit
     ├── Trigger Render deploy
     ├── Wait for deployment
     ├── Compare SHA
     ├── Verify /health
     ├── Verify APIs
     ├── Verify Supabase
     ├── Roll back if unhealthy
     └── Produce evidence report
